primaryWorkspace.description: Preferred .code-workspace, .slnx, .sln, or .csproj path. Relative paths resolve from navlyn.workspace.json.

workspaceCandidates.description: Candidate files or directories to search when primaryWorkspace is omitted.

excludes.description: Relative path prefixes or simple wildcard expressions excluded from candidate selection.

generatedFolders.description: Generated-code folders excluded from workspace candidate selection.

defaultRootPolicy.description: Default root policy used unless --workspace-root-policy overrides it.

allowRoots.description: Additional roots allowed when defaultRootPolicy or --workspace-root-policy is allow-listed.

cacheHints.description: Optional hints for the opt-in lightweight .navlyn/cache workspace manifest used by workspace-status and workspace-refresh.

enabled.description: When true, --cache auto inspects or writes the workspace cache manifest. Defaults to false.

directory.description: Cache directory. Relative paths resolve from navlyn.workspace.json. Defaults to .navlyn/cache.
